hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys; sys.stdin.read(); print(json.dumps({'systemMessage':'Brain v3 — read brain_v2/brain_state.json first','hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'SessionStart','additionalContext':'MANDATORY FIRST ACTION: Read brain_v2/brain_state.json (3.5% of context, 10 AGI layers — objects with relationships inline, behavioral rules, claims, known_unknowns, falsification, superseded, user_questions, data_quality). This single file replaces the old multi-file session-start ceremony. After reading, run: python brain_v2/graph_queries.py stats — to verify freshness. If stale, run: python brain_v2/rebuild_all.py before any other work.'}}))"
